nodes.label: AI reliability for large datasets
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and fabrication with large datasets
nodes.grounding_span: AI generally has problems analyzing very large data sets

nodes.label: AI as iterative collaborator with human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I check in frequently and collaborate

nodes.label: AI efficiency for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: we used AI to really help develop some curriculum mapping that took hours of work and did it within a few minutes

nodes.label: AI use for internal analysis vs. external narrative
nodes.grounding_span: for data analysis it's for my eyes only so it does not matter, however for narrative I am very cautious

nodes.label: AI impact on team roles
nodes.grounding_span: it would impact the roles of people who report to me (likely eliminating them or reducing to part time)

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: took hours of work and did it within a few minutes

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: AI started to fabricate heavily the information

nodes.label: Professional reputation and caution
nodes.grounding_span: for narrative I am very cautious with my AI use and final product

nodes.label: Institutional sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: lower tuition for students to attend colleges (less staff means a smaller budget)

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's simple task failure
nodes.grounding_span: Frustrated is fairly easy - we had a simple task we were doing...the AI would do a block of 10 names, and then would punt

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI's complex task success
nodes.grounding_span: we used AI to really help develop some curriculum mapping that took hours of work and did it within a few minutes

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI capability
nodes.grounding_span: my intention is to vastly increase my AI use - Chat5 is already well ahead of where o3 was

nodes.label: Caution in public-facing AI use
nodes.grounding_span: for narrative I am very cautious with my AI use and final product

nodes.label: Iterative sample-checking approach
nodes.grounding_span: I always have AI give samples, stop let me review then provide more detailed response

nodes.label: Domain-based compartmentalization of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: for data analysis it's for my eyes only so it does not matter, however for narrative I am very cautious
